evidence.description: Lines 17-25 import subscribeEditingSessionState (line 21) and createBlockEditorAdapter (line 23); line 31 instantiates blockEditorAdapter; line 32 holds editingSessionState in $state; lines 58-65 wire subscribeEditingSessionState in $effect with cleanup return; lines 116-123 pass both as props to FeedList. End-to-end production wiring is present. Resolves iter-1 FIND-S5-PHASE3-001.
Lines 23-24 import EditingSessionStateDto and BlockEditorAdapter; lines 42-45 declare props; lines 53-54 destructure with default null; lines 403-404 forward both to each FeedRow.

Lines 30-31 import BlockEditorAdapter / EditingSessionStateDto types; lines 49-52 declare props; lines 58-59 destructure with default null; line 448 mount gate `{#if shouldMountBlocks && blockEditorAdapter}` now reachable in production.

Lines 1119 (EARS), 1121-1122 (clarification), 1173 (AC step 1), 1174 (AC step 2) all consistently describe payload shape `{ noteId, type: 'paragraph', content: '', issuedAt }` for dispatchInsertBlockAtBeginning and `{ noteId, blockId: <client-generated UUID>, issuedAt }` for dispatchFocusBlock. Verified consistent with verification-architecture.md:715 (PROP-FEED-S5-011) and implementation at FeedRow.svelte:290-295,300-305. Iter-2 FIND-S5-PHASE3-iter2-001 RESOLVED.

Lines 842-881 PROP-FEED-S5-019 performs 3 clicks: (1) idle→click 1 dispatches (line 854-856), (2) remount in switching state, click 2 NOT dispatched (line 872-874), (3) click 3 NOT dispatched (line 876-878). Both halves of the race-suppression invariant exercised. Iter-1 FIND-S5-PHASE3-003 RESOLVED.

Reviewed lines 1-359. PROP-FEED-S5-011 idempotency scenarios (a)-(e) exercise the FeedRow $effect via FeedRowSprint5Wrapper for cases (b)/(d) and direct mount for (a)/(c)/(e). Scenario (d) at lines 215-250 verifies undefined→non-empty→undefined produces a fresh UUID via restart condition (iii). Test assertions at lines 207, 210 use the new payload shape (`insertCall.type === 'paragraph'`, `focusCall.blockId === renderedId`).
Lines 58-65: subscribeEditingSessionState wired in $effect; cleanup returns unsubscribe(). No reactive deps inside the effect, runs once on mount and cleans up on unmount. Correct.

Lines 250-310 $effect logic: blocksPresent path resets fallbackAppliedFor (line 272) and sets lastBlocksWasNonEmpty=true (line 270); absent path checks (i) null state, (ii) noteId switch, (iii) prior non-empty cycle (lines 277-278); guards null adapter at line 287; both await calls in try/catch at lines 289-308. Dispatch payload at lines 290-295 sends `{ noteId: noteIdNow, type: 'paragraph', content: '', issuedAt: at }` matching EARS at behavioral-spec.md:1119 and AC at line 1173. Dispatch at lines 301-305 sends `{ noteId: noteIdNow, blockId: newId, issuedAt: nowIso() }` matching AC at line 1174. Logic correct.
Lines 27-64: 16 dispatch methods with documented Tauri command names; each payload includes issuedAt. Now actually instantiated in +page.svelte (line 31).

Lines 34-54: synchronous handler (no await/then/setTimeout/queueMicrotask inside listen callback); INBOUND only (no invoke import, only listen from @tauri-apps/api/event at line 15). Now actually consumed by +page.svelte (line 59).

Audit script unchanged; PROP-FEED-S5-001/002/003/004/012/014/015/017/021 still enforced. Listener count (PROP-FEED-S5-003) still equals 1 because +page.svelte uses subscribeEditingSessionState() not listen() directly.
Single-column layout (REQ-FEED-028) preserved; .feed-main wrapper at line 115, no grid-template-columns, height: 100vh present at line 147.

REQ-FEED-031 now internally consistent: EARS (line 1119), clarification block (1121-1122), AC step 1 (line 1173: `dispatchInsertBlockAtBeginning({ noteId, type: 'paragraph', content: '', issuedAt: <ISO> })`), AND AC step 2 (line 1174: `dispatchFocusBlock({ noteId, blockId: <client-generated UUID>, issuedAt: <ISO> })`) all use the SAME payload shape. The `<UUID>` reference correctly lives only on dispatchFocusBlock.blockId. Spec also matches verification-architecture.md:715. Iter-2 FIND-S5-PHASE3-iter2-001 RESOLVED.

8-test suite asserts the wiring chain via source grep: +page.svelte imports + subscribe call (with $effect cleanup regex at line 38) + adapter instantiation (line 43) + FeedList prop pass (lines 48-49); FeedList declares props (lines 54-55) + forwards to FeedRow (lines 60-61); FeedRow declares props (lines 66-67) + uses {#if shouldMountBlocks && blockEditorAdapter} mount gate (line 73). Provides positive evidence that production code calls the helper functions, not just that the helpers exist.
PROP-FEED-S5-019 verified to exercise REQ-FEED-006 click suppression invariant: real first click on idle (line 854) followed by suppressed clicks on switching state (lines 872, 876).

criteriaResults.rationale: +page.svelte single-column layout, height:100vh at line 147, no forbidden identifiers; main-route.dom.vitest.ts source-structure assertions pass. No regression from iter-2.

Listener exists exactly once in editingSessionChannel.ts (line 39) and is async-free. +page.svelte invokes subscribeEditingSessionState in $effect (lines 58-65) with cleanup. main-route-wiring.dom.vitest.ts asserts the call presence + cleanup regex.

+page.svelte instantiates blockEditorAdapter via createBlockEditorAdapter() (line 31) and passes it through FeedList (line 122) → FeedRow (FeedList line 404). The mount gate `shouldMountBlocks && blockEditorAdapter` (FeedRow line 448) fires in production.

Fallback dispatch chain reachable in production. Implementation at FeedRow.svelte:290-295 sends `{ noteId, type, content, issuedAt }` matching EARS (behavioral-spec.md:1119), AC step 1 (line 1173), and verification-architecture.md PROP-FEED-S5-011 (line 715). The previous spec/AC inconsistency that drove iter-1 FIND-S5-PHASE3-004 and iter-2 FIND-S5-PHASE3-iter2-001 is fully resolved — REQ-FEED-031 EARS, clarification block, and AC enumeration now agree.
Sprint-4 emit-order baseline preserved; editingSessionChannel handler at editingSessionChannel.ts:39-45 is synchronous. REQ-FEED-032 invariant intact.
Forbidden-identifier audit (PROP-FEED-S5-014) and src/lib/editor/ filesystem absence (PROP-FEED-S5-015) both clean. The wiring imports introduced no forbidden identifiers.
Sub-assertions a/b/c/d operate against direct-mounted FeedRow with hand-injected blockEditorAdapter; production blockEditorAdapter is now wired so the same surface is reachable in production.

PROP-FEED-S5-019 performs real first click on idle followed by suppressed clicks on switching state (FeedRow.dom.vitest.ts:842-881). PROP-FEED-S5-018 row-level remount continuity verified. PROP-FEED-S5-020 imports the channel module directly (acceptable for EC-FEED-020 timing-edge proof).
